evidenceContract.userBehavior: Terminate the first TUI Host after a valid Workspace Board delivery is queued, then let a second Host resume it.

observables.description: Stable delivery identity, claim epochs, single Canvas effect, projected receipt, and terminal idle facts.

evidenceContract.expectedResult: Host B resumes the same delivery identity, applies exactly one Canvas batch, and reaches terminal idle.
evidenceContract.expectedFailure: Changed identity, stale commit success, duplicate processing Group, missing receipt, or non-idle recovery fails.

steps.prompt: Create one named reviewable Markdown analysis artifact and wait until the Workspace Board delivery is queued.
Resume the same workspace delivery context and confirm it remains available.
